# terrible_community_general_gitlab_protected_branch (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name of the branch that needs to be protected. Can make use a wildcard character for like `production/*` or just have `main` or `develop` as value.
- `project` (String) The path and name of the project.

### Optional

- `allow_force_push` (Boolean) Whether or not to allow force pushes to the protected branch.
- `code_owner_approval_required` (Boolean) Whether or not to require code owner approval to push.
- `merge_access_levels` (String) Access levels allowed to merge.
- `push_access_level` (String) Access levels allowed to push.
- `state` (String) Create or delete protected branch.
